doc: The fixed starting instrument for the #220 M1 demo bar. A self-contained, always-on bass drone: a 55 Hz (A1) sawtooth through a gentle low-pass, straight to the master output. It sounds the moment `reuben play` opens the device — no OSC note needed — so the human ear has a steady reference to judge the agent's edit against. Deliberately a raw saw with an open-ish filter: it has obvious room to be made 'rounder', and no delay yet, so 'add a dub delay' is an audible addition. Resource-free (no voice sub-patch) so the fixture never rots against the instrument library.

nodes.doc: The bass oscillator — a raw 55 Hz sawtooth, the timbre the demo prompt asks to round off.
A gentle low-pass shaping the saw. Left fairly open (700 Hz) so there is headroom to make the bass 'rounder' by closing it down / leaning on resonance.
